subject: grammar
title: Relative Clauses: Email Extracts
instruction: There is a mistake with relative clauses in each of the email extracts below. Find the mistakes and correct them.

questions.text: I want to get in touch with the woman which we met at the meeting last week.
I'm sending this email to ask for more information about the language courses which I saw them advertised in The Daily Star yesterday.
I'm finding my new job exhausting, that is not surprising considering I have to travel so much.
I really enjoyed the lecture which you gave it on Wednesday, and am thinking about doing my assignment on the same topic.
It's the one which in you have written your lecture notes.
questions.answer: which you have written your lecture notes in|||in which

questions.text: I've got today's newspaper which has a list of films.
I want some of those bread rolls what we had last week.
You are clearly a person who life is full and busy.
